summary: Root ErrorBoundary verification + regression pass. (1) Navigating to '/?crash=1' triggers Home's intentional throw; AppErrorBoundary catches it (console log 'AppErrorBoundary caught: Intentional crash to test ErrorBoundary') and renders the fallback UI with testID 'error-boundary-fallback', text 'Oops, something went wrong', sub-copy, and 'Try Again' button (testID 'error-boundary-retry-button') — no white screen. Screenshot confirms clean fallback UI. Tapping Try Again re-renders; because ?crash=1 persists in the URL on web, Home re-throws and fallback shows again — acceptable per request spec. (2) Regression: normal Home ('/' no query) renders hero, admin lock, 'Get a Free Quote' CTA, and 'Privacy Policy' link. (3) Full flow Home -> Get a Free Quote (quote-screen) -> select Standard Cleaning + House, fill name/phone/email/address -> Submit -> success screen reached (URL navigated to /success). (4) Home -> Privacy link (home-privacy-link) opens privacy-screen. (5) Admin PIN 1234 via pin-key-1..4 -> leads-screen loads. Only pre-existing warning (already noted in previous iterations): 'shadow*' style props deprecated on web preview from src/theme — harmless.
critical_code_review_comments: ErrorBoundary implementation is correct: class-based AppErrorBoundary uses getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch; wraps <Stack> in _layout.tsx L41-50 so any screen-level render error is caught. Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:29-48, /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx:41-50.
expo-router route-level ErrorBoundary export in _layout.tsx L20-22 also delegates to ErrorFallback and receives router-provided retry() — good belt-and-braces coverage for router-side errors.

Home crash test hook is minimal and scoped (throws only when useLocalSearchParams returns crash === '1'). Consider gating with __DEV__ if you don't want end users to be able to reach the fallback via URL manipulation in production, but functionally harmless — reference /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:26-31.
Fallback UI meets touch-target guidelines (retry button height 54px) and has proper contrast (brand purple bg, white text).
seed_data_creation: 1 additional lead created during regression: 'TEST_ErrorBoundary Regression' (Standard Cleaning · House, +1 555 111 2222, eb_test@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: ErrorBoundary is live: AppErrorBoundary class in /app/frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx wraps <Stack> in _layout.tsx. Trigger crash via URL '/?crash=1' — Home throws intentionally when crash param === '1'. Fallback testIDs: 'error-boundary-fallback' (root) and 'error-boundary-retry-button' (Try Again). Note: on web, retry state resets but URL still contains ?crash=1 so Home re-throws — acceptable per E1's spec. To fully recover on web, navigate away first or clear the query param.
